title: Campfire Enchanting
description: Brings an early game way to enchant, using campfires
body:
This datapack/mod aims to make enchantments easier to access at the early and mid-game, while not overshadowing enchanting tables in their current state.

## Features include
- **Throwing yourself into a campfire/soul campfire is actually a good thing now!** (if you have lapis-lazuli, and enough levels).
- Normal campfires **require 5 levels** and one lapis. They enchant your items at **level 15**, compared to a enchanting table, but have a small chance of applying a curse.
- Soul campfires **require 15 levels** and also one lapis. They enchant your items at **level 30+**, compared to a enchanting table, but they always apply curses.
- Tools that could only receive enchantments through anvils - like flint and steel, shears, carrot on a stick and brushes -, work with campfires!
